features.name: casez with concatenation containing 4-state literal
features.description: Code should include a casez statement where the case expression uses a concatenation containing a 4-state literal value (such as 1'b1) combined with other signals
features.snippet:
wire [2:0] foo;
always @(*) casez ({1'b1, foo}) 3'b???: ; endcase

features.name: wildcard pattern in casez statement
features.description: Code should include a casez statement with wildcard pattern using question marks (???) to match any value in a 3-bit pattern
